opportunities.title: Automate venue data flow from sign-up to Hub to HubSpot
opportunities.problem_summary: After sign-up, an offshore team manually copies every form field into HubSpot, then into Hub, then types the full menu from a PDF, reconciles opening hours across 3 sources, places the map pin by hand, and curates photos. At ~400 venues/month this costs $200k+/year in FTE for work that is almost entirely transcription.
opportunities.opportunity_sizing: ~400 venues/month affected. Estimated $200k+/year FTE saving from automating the data flow alone.
opportunities.recommended_next_step: Raise Jira IDEA ticket. Assign to Vaishali. Bring Karen into refinement as SME.

opportunities.title: Menu digitisation automation agent
opportunities.problem_summary: Every venue requires a fully digitised menu. Offshore staff manually reads PDF menus and types word-by-word into the menu portal. Complex menus (pizza with toppings, per-size pricing) can take a full day per venue. Jeroen has a PoC; Cam has a Google scraper — both solving the same problem independently.
opportunities.opportunity_sizing: ~400 venues/month onboarding + ongoing updates for existing base. 10 min to 8 hrs per venue. 10% error rate creating rework.
opportunities.recommended_next_step: Convene Jeroen, Cam, and Adam for a 45-min session to align on approach before further independent building. Raise Jira IDEA ticket once approach is agreed.

opportunities.title: AI tool governance framework
opportunities.problem_summary: Multiple people (Sam, Jeroen, Adam, Brian, Jess) are independently building AI tools with no governance, no shared code repo, no architecture alignment. Sam's Billy tool is running 507 Claude instances/day in production with no automated tests.
opportunities.opportunity_sizing: Current: 507 Claude API calls/day in uncontrolled production. Risk: 10+ isolated tools in 9-12 months.
opportunities.recommended_next_step: Escalate to leadership. Convene Adam, Jeroen, Sam, Allen, Brian before end of April to agree a shared AI infrastructure policy.
